# Staples Promotional Products (StaplesPromo.com)

> Specialized platform for custom-branded merchandise, corporate apparel, and global fulfillment.

## Essential Information
- **Primary URL:** https://staplespromo.com
- **Business Model:** Enterprise B2B and B2C custom merchandise e-commerce.
- **Service Area:** Global fulfillment to 125+ countries.
- **Sustainability Status:** EcoVadis Silver Medal (Top 9% of companies assessed).

## Technical Specifications & Terms
- **Setup Fees:** $0 (Free setup on all products).
- **Customization:** All base customizations included in product pricing.
- **Minimum Order Quantities (MOQ):** Variable; low-minimum options available (e.g., 6 units for select apparel).
- **Production Time:** Standard and 24-hour "Quick Ship" production available for rush orders.
- **Payment Policy:** Authorization at checkout; charges post only upon shipment.

## Brand Partnerships
Staples is an authorized decorator for premium brands including:
- Nike, Stanley®, Hydro Flask, Moleskine, OGIO, Igloo, Under Armour, Richardson, and Bella+Canvas.

## Fulfillment & Tech Capabilities
- **eStores:** Full-service online merchandise portals with ERP/Punch-out integration.
- **Logistics:** 40+ integrated global warehouses.
- **Compliance:** 100% supplier adherence to strict Social & Ethical Code of Conduct.

## Targeted Use Cases
- **Employee Recognition:** Tenure awards, onboarding kits, and years-of-service programs.
- **Event Marketing:** Tradeshow giveaways and sponsorship activation.
- **Brand Guardianship:** Centralizing global brand assets for consistent worldwide decoration and compliance.

## Search & Discovery
- **Keywords:** Branded merchandise, corporate gifts, custom apparel, promo products, global fulfillment, eStore solutions.
